142755.name: short_term_positivity_rate
142755.s_name: Official data collated by Our World in Data

source.name: Official data collated by Our World in Data
source.additionalInfo:
Data on COVID-19 testing. Comparisons between countries are compromised for several reasons.

You can download the full dataset, alongside detailed source descriptions here: https://github.com/owid/covid-19-data/tree/master/public/data/

145467.name: Days since daily new confirmed cases of COVID-19 per million people (rolling 7-day average, right-aligned) reached 1
145467.s_name: Johns Hopkins University CSSE COVID-19 Data – Last updated 25 December, 06:06 (London time)

source.name: Johns Hopkins University CSSE COVID-19 Data – Last updated 25 December, 06:06 (London time)
source.dataPublishedBy: COVID-19 Data Repository by the Center for Systems Science and Engineering (CSSE) at Johns Hopkins University
source.additionalInfo: Raw data on confirmed cases and deaths for all countries is sourced from the COVID-19 Data Repository by the Center for Systems Science and Engineering (CSSE) at Johns Hopkins University. Our complete COVID-19 dataset is a collection of the COVID-19 data maintained by Our World in Data. It is updated daily and includes data on confirmed cases, deaths, hospitalizations, and testing. We have created a new description of all our data sources. You find it at our GitHub repository here. There you can download all of our data.
